c1.speaker: tuck
c1.line: Gibbons. Big night tonight. Crowd control plan is as follows: it's Lanternside. There's no crowd to control. There's neighbors, standing close together, on purpose.

c2.speaker: gary
c2.line: Any predictions for the vault, Constable?

c3.speaker: tuck
c3.line: Drawings. A tooth, probably — kids were always sealing teeth in things back then, for science. And fifty years of people getting exactly what they hoped for, which is the rarest thing I police. Pastry?
